data.title: feat: SKOGAI.md — root context router
data.description:
The entry-point [CLAUDE.md](<http://CLAUDE.md>) equivalent for the `.skogai/` folder. Tells any agent dropped into the project where everything lives.

## What

* `what_is_this` — what this project is
* `structure` — `@`-prefixed directory map (lazy routing, not content dumps)
* `where_to_look` table — task → location quick reference
* `always_load` — files always relevant (e.g. `memory/context/current.md`)
* `content_creation` — how to use templates
* `commands` — common bootstrap/usage commands
